errors.laserOverheated: Oh no! Your laser canon overheated from shooting too fast! You need to move before you can shoot a second time.
errors.missedShot: Oh no, you missed. Wasting ammo is not allowed!
errors.moveOffEdge: Oh no, you tried to move off the edge!

checks.notShotAllAliens: You didn't shoot down all the aliens.

conditionalShoot.name: Use an if statement to shoot only when there's an alien above
conditionalShoot.description: Move across the screen, checking each position. If there's an alien above you, shoot it. If not, just move on.

conditional1.name: Scattered aliens
conditional1.description: Aliens scattered across two rows with gaps

conditional3.name: Alternating rows
conditional3.description: Aliens alternating between top and bottom rows

conditional4.name: Bottom-heavy
conditional4.description: Most aliens in the bottom row

conditional5.name: Dense formation
conditional5.description: Many aliens packed together across both rows

howToDecide.question: How do I decide whether to shoot or not?
howToDecide.answer: Use an `if` statement that checks `isAlienAbove()`. Only call `shoot()` when it returns `true`.

whatIsAlienAboveGives.question: What does `isAlienAbove()` give me back?
whatIsAlienAboveGives.answer: It returns `true` if there's an alien directly above your cannon, and `false` otherwise. You can put it straight into an `if` condition.

checkEveryColumn.question: How do I check every column without writing the same code over and over?
checkEveryColumn.answer: Wrap your check-and-maybe-shoot logic in a `repeat` loop, calling `move()` at the end of each iteration to slide to the next column.

keepShootingEmpty.question: I keep shooting empty columns and losing. What's wrong?
keepShootingEmpty.answer: Make sure `shoot()` is inside the `if` block, not after it. The call should only happen when `isAlienAbove()` is `true`.

move.description: Moves the laser cannon **one position to the right**. If you move off the right edge of the screen, you lose!

shoot.description: Shoots the laser upwards. **Only shoot when there's an alien above you**, or you lose the game!

isAlienAbove.description: Returns `true` if there's an alien directly above the laser cannon, or `false` if not. Use this to check before shooting!
